descriptionByLocale.it: At Board, we power financial and operational planning solutions for the world’s best brands. Thousands of enterprises use our technology to optimize resources, drive growth, and ensure profitability. With advanced analytics and forecasting, plus AI-driven insights, customers transform complex, real-time data into actionable intelligence. What’s been key to our success? Our people—we value everyone’s unique perspective and energy they bring to the organization. We collaborate openly across teams and borders. We embrace a growth mindset to get results. And we celebrate shared success as goals and milestones are achieved. Ready to join a team where innovation meets collaboration? If you're driven by bold ideas and a customer-centric mentality, your next adventure starts here! We are looking for a ## Senior Consultant Financial Consolidation to join our Professional Services Center of Excellence ( ## CoE ) at our ## Chiasso HQ . In this role, you will lead and deliver complex financial consolidation projects for enterprise customers, helping them design and implement modern, scalable consolidation and reporting solutions using Board technology. As a senior member of the team, you will combine deep functional expertise in group consolidation (IFRS/local GAAP, intercompany eliminations, currency translation, statutory reporting) with strong consulting capabilities. You will act as a trusted advisor to customers, guide best practices, and contribute to the evolution of our Financial Consolidation CoE. You will report directly to the CoE Director and collaborate closely with Product, Customer Success, Support and other consulting teams across regions. ## Key Responsibilities: CoE Oversight & Implementation - Contribute to the Global Consolidation & Reporting (GCR) Center of Excellence by promoting standards, delivery governance, and best practices. - Review and validate key implementation deliverables (data model, consolidation rules, mappings, test packs, runbooks, and training materials). - Support configuration and validation of consolidation processes including:Consolidation perimeter definitionOwnership structures and minority interestsIntercompany eliminationsFX translation and CTAJournals and adjustmentsAudit trails, controls, and reporting - Consolidation perimeter definition - Ownership structures and minority interests - Intercompany eliminations - FX translation and CTA - Journals and adjustments - Audit trails, controls, and reporting - Provide hands-on support during critical project phases (UAT, go-live, first close cycle). - Drive reconciliation activities and variance resolution during stabilization phases. - Develop and maintain reusable CoE assets (templates, checklists, standard test scripts, and playbooks). - Enable and coach delivery teams and partners on consolidation standards and solution best practices. Support & Ticket Resolution - Triage and resolve L2/L3 functional support tickets related to:Data loads and integrationsConfiguration and calculation rulesSecurity and workflowReporting and reconciliation - Data loads and integrations - Configuration and calculation rules - Security and workflow - Reporting and reconciliation - Conduct structured root-cause analysis and implement sustainable fixes. - Communicate clearly and proactively with stakeholders regarding issue resolution. - Escalate product defects to Engineering and validate fixes. - Document solutions in knowledge base articles and troubleshooting guides to improve scalability and reduce recurring issues. ## Required Skills & Qualifications - Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Finance, Accounting, Business Administration, or related field. - 3-5 years of experience in financial consolidation consulting or corporate group consolidation roles. - Experience implementing EPM/CPM/consolidation software solutions. - Familiarity with IFRS and/or local GAAP (e.g., OIC). - Ability to design and validate consolidated Balance Sheets, P&L, and Cash Flow Statements. - Strong understanding of intercompany eliminations, currency translation and CTA, equity reconciliation and minority interest, journals and adjustments, auditability and reconciliation process. - Strong analytical and problem-solving skills. - Excellent stakeholder management and communication skills. - Fluency in English (additional European languages are a plus). - Willingness to travel as required for client engagements. ## Preferred Qualifications - Hands-on experience with Board GCR. - Previous experience in a Big Four firm or Finance Transformation consultancy. - Official CPM platform certifications. - Knowledge of IFRS 16 (Lease Accounting). - Familiarity with ESG reporting frameworks. - Exposure to XBRL/ESEF regulatory reporting requirements. ## Working Model - Location: Chiasso HQ (Switzerland). - Hybrid working model available in alignment with company policy. - Occasional international travel depending on project needs. ## What We Offer - Opportunity to work with leading global organizations. - Exposure to complex, high-impact financial transformation projects. - A collaborative and international environment. - Professional growth within a fast-growing, innovative technology company. ## Our commitment to Diversity and Inclusion Join a company that believes in the added value of diversity, inclusion, and belonging. We foster a working environment in which all people are respected and valued, for all aspects which make them unique. We hire you for who you are, and we want you to bring your true self to work every day! Board International is an equal opportunity employer and is committed to a diverse and inclusive workforce. Your personal data will be stored for as long as it is necessary to process the job applications that you submitted and for the provision of the service that you requested. Your personal data may also be processed for the fulfillment of the obligations provided for by law. Your data will in any case be deleted without unjustified delay once the aforementioned legal obligations have been fulfilled. Your personal data are collected and used by Board International SA and/or its subsidiaries that are located in the EU or outside on the basis of the appropriate safeguards provided by the European Regulation 2016/679. At any time you may request to access, to correct and/or delete your personal data used by Board International SA or by its subsidiaries for recruiting purposes. For further question, please refer to our Privacy Policy at https://www.board.com/en/privacy-policy

descriptionByLocale.it: In Board, forniamo soluzioni di pianificazione finanziaria e operativa per i migliori brand al mondo. Migliaia di imprese utilizzano la nostra tecnologia per ottimizzare le risorse, stimolare la crescita e garantire la redditività. Con analisi avanzate e previsioni, oltre a insight guidati dall'IA, i clienti trasformano dati complessi e in tempo reale in informazioni operative. Qual è stata la chiave del nostro successo? Le persone – valorizziamo la prospettiva unica e l'energia che ciascuno porta all'organizzazione. Collaboriamo apertamente tra team e confini. Abbracciamo una mentalità di crescita per ottenere risultati. E celebriamo i successi condivisi man mano che obiettivi e traguardi vengono raggiunti. Pronto a entrare in un team dove innovazione e collaborazione si incontrano? Se sei guidato da idee audaci e da una mentalità incentrata sul cliente, la tua prossima avventura inizia qui! Stiamo cercando un Videomaker & Motion Designer da inserire nel nostro team Global Marketing presso la sede di Chiasso, con contratto temporaneo di copertura maternità. Riportando al Communication Manager e collaborando strettamente con il Graphic & Creative Leader, avrai un ruolo chiave nella produzione di contenuti video e visivi coinvolgenti che supportano la strategia di comunicazione globale di Board. Questo ruolo offre un'opportunità unica di portare la tua creatività e le tue capacità narrative in un'azienda software internazionale in rapida crescita, con un prodotto all'avanguardia tecnologica nel suo mercato. Responsabilità chiave - Supportare la produzione di video istituzionali e di marketing usando Adobe After Effects e Adobe Premiere - Gestire i flussi di lavoro di editing video e post‑produzione - Registrare contenuti foto e video per iniziative di comunicazione interne ed esterne - Produrre motion graphics e asset visivi animati a supporto delle campagne di marketing e della narrazione aziendale - Collaborare con i team Marketing e Creative per garantire la coerenza visiva con l'identità del brand Board - Assistere nell'allestimento e nella gestione di luci e attrezzature di registrazione durante interviste, eventi e riprese live Competenze e qualifiche richieste - Esperienza comprovata nella produzione video, motion design e graphic design - Solida competenza nell'editing video con Adobe Premiere - Capacità di motion graphics e animazione con Adobe After Effects - Esperienza nell'uso di videocamere professionali (es. Sony Alpha 7, FX3) - Capacità di allestire e gestire attrezzature di illuminazione professionale per interviste, riprese video ed eventi - Padronanza della Adobe Creative Suite, inclusi: Photoshop, Lightroom, Illustrator - Buona conoscenza degli strumenti Microsoft Office - Ottime capacità organizzative e di gestione del tempo - Capacità di lavorare in modo collaborativo in un ambiente di squadra - Mentalità creativa con forte attenzione ai dettagli - Fluente in inglese (obbligatorio) Qualifiche preferenziali - Esperienza con software di modellazione 3D o animazione 3D - Precedente esperienza in un contesto di marketing corporate o B2B Il nostro impegno per la Diversità e l'Inclusione Unisciti a un'azienda che crede nel valore aggiunto della diversità, dell'inclusione e del senso di appartenenza. Favoriamo un ambiente di lavoro in cui tutte le persone sono rispettate e valorizzate per tutti gli aspetti che le rendono uniche. Ti assumiamo per quello che sei, e vogliamo che porti il tuo vero sé al lavoro ogni giorno! Board International è un datore di lavoro che offre pari opportunità ed è impegnata a mantenere una forza lavoro diversificata e inclusiva. I tuoi dati personali saranno conservati per tutto il tempo necessario a elaborare le candidature che hai inviato e per la fornitura del servizio richiesto. I tuoi dati potranno anche essere trattati per adempiere agli obblighi previsti dalla legge. In ogni caso, i dati saranno cancellati senza indebito ritardo una volta soddisfatti gli obblighi legali sopra citati. I tuoi dati sono raccolti e utilizzati da Board International SA e/o dalle sue controllate situate nell'UE o al di fuori, sulla base delle adeguate garanzie previste dal Regolamento Europeo 2016/679. In qualsiasi momento potrai richiedere l'accesso, la correzione e/o la cancellazione dei tuoi dati personali utilizzati da Board International SA o dalle sue controllate per scopi di reclutamento. Per ulteriori domande, consulta la nostra all'indirizzo https://www.board.com/en/privacy-policy
descriptionByLocale.en: At Board, we power financial and operational planning solutions for the world’s best brands. Thousands of enterprises use our technology to optimize resources, drive growth, and ensure profitability. With advanced analytics and forecasting, plus AI-driven insights, customers transform complex, real-time data into actionable intelligence.What’s been key to our success? Our people—we value everyone’s unique perspective and energy they bring to the organization. We collaborate openly across teams and borders. We embrace a growth mindset to get results. If you're driven by bold ideas and a customer-centric mentality, your next adventure starts here!We are currently looking for a Videomaker & Motion Designer to join our Global Marketing team at our Chiasso HQ on a temporary maternity cover contract.Reporting to the Communication Manager and working closely with the Graphic & Creative Leader, you will play a key role in producing engaging video and visual content that supports Board’s global communication strategy.This role offers a unique opportunity to bring your creativity and storytelling skills to an international, fast-growing software company with a product at the technological forefront of its market.Key Responsibilities - Support the production of institutional and marketing videos using Adobe After Effects and Adobe Premiere - Manage video editing and post-production workflows - Record photo and video content for internal and external communication initiatives - Produce motion graphics and animated visual assets to support marketing campaigns and corporate storytelling - Collaborate with the Marketing and Creative teams to ensure visual consistency with Board’s brand identity - Assist with the setup and management of lighting and recording equipment during interviews, events, and live shoots Required Skills and Qualifications - Proven experience in video production, motion design, and graphic design - Strong expertise in video editing with Adobe Premiere - Motion graphics and animation skills using Adobe After Effects - Experience operating professional video cameras (e.g., Sony Alpha 7, FX3) - Ability to set up and manage professional lighting equipment for interviews, video shoots, and events - Proficiency in Adobe Creative Suite, including:PhotoshopLightroomIllustrator - Photoshop - Lightroom - Illustrator - Good knowledge of Microsoft Office tools - Strong organizational and time management skills - Ability to work collaboratively in a team environment - Creative mindset with strong attention to detail - Fluency in English is required Preferred Qualifications - Experience with 3D modeling or 3D animation software - Previous experience in a corporate or B2B marketing environment Our commitment to Diversity and InclusionJoin a company that believes in the added value of diversity, inclusion, and belonging. We foster a working environment in which all people are respected and valued, for all aspects which make them unique. We hire you for who you are, and we want you to bring your true self to work every day! Board International is an equal opportunity employer and is committed to a diverse and inclusive workforce. descriptionByLocale.de: Bei Board liefern wir Finanz- und Betriebsplanungs‑Lösungen für die besten Marken der Welt. Tausende Unternehmen nutzen unsere Technologie, um Ressourcen zu optimieren, Wachstum zu fördern und die Rentabilität sicherzustellen. Mit fortschrittlicher Analytik und Prognosen sowie KI‑gestützten Erkenntnissen verwandeln Kunden komplexe, Echtzeit‑Daten in umsetzbare Informationen. Was war der Schlüssel zu unserem Erfolg? Unsere Menschen – wir schätzen die einzigartige Perspektive und Energie, die jeder in die Organisation einbringt. Wir arbeiten offen über Teams und Grenzen hinweg zusammen. Wir verfolgen eine Wachstums‑Mindset, um Ergebnisse zu erzielen. Und wir feiern gemeinsame Erfolge, wenn Ziele und Meilensteine erreicht werden. Bereit, einem Team beizutreten, in dem Innovation auf Zusammenarbeit trifft? Wenn Sie von mutigen Ideen und einer kundenorientierten Mentalität angetrieben werden, beginnt Ihr nächstes Abenteuer hier! Wir suchen derzeit einen Videomaker & Motion Designer, der unser Global‑Marketing‑Team an unserem Hauptsitz in Chiasso im Rahmen eines befristeten Mutterschafts‑Vertretungsvertrags unterstützt. Sie berichten an den Communication Manager und arbeiten eng mit dem Graphic & Creative Leader zusammen. Sie übernehmen eine Schlüsselrolle bei der Produktion ansprechender Video‑ und Bildinhalte, die die globale Kommunikationsstrategie von Board unterstützen. Diese Position bietet die einzigartige Möglichkeit, Ihre Kreativität und Storytelling‑Fähigkeiten in ein internationales, schnell wachsendes Softwareunternehmen einzubringen, dessen Produkt technologisch an der Spitze seines Marktes steht. Wesentliche Aufgaben - Unterstützung bei der Produktion von institutionellen und Marketing‑Videos mit Adobe After Effects und Adobe Premiere - Verwaltung von Video‑Editing‑ und Post‑Production‑Workflows - Aufnahme von Foto‑ und Videomaterial für interne und externe Kommunikationsinitiativen - Erstellung von Motion‑Graphics und animierten visuellen Assets zur Unterstützung von Marketingkampagnen und Unternehmens‑Storytelling - Zusammenarbeit mit den Marketing‑ und Creative‑Teams, um visuelle Konsistenz mit der Markenidentität von Board sicherzustellen - Unterstützung beim Aufbau und der Verwaltung von Beleuchtungs‑ und Aufnahmegeräten während Interviews, Events und Live‑Aufnahmen Erforderliche Fähigkeiten und Qualifikationen - Nachweisbare Erfahrung in Videoproduktion, Motion Design und Grafikdesign - Starke Expertise im Video‑Editing mit Adobe Premiere - Fähigkeiten in Motion‑Graphics und Animation mit Adobe After Effects - Erfahrung im Umgang mit professionellen Videokameras (z. B. Sony Alpha 7, FX3) - Fähigkeit, professionelle Beleuchtungsausrüstung für Interviews, Videoaufnahmen und Events einzurichten und zu managen - Beherrschung der Adobe Creative Suite, einschließlich: Photoshop, Lightroom, Illustrator - Gute Kenntnisse der Microsoft‑Office‑Tools - Starke organisatorische Fähigkeiten und Zeitmanagement - Fähigkeit zur Zusammenarbeit im Team - Kreativer Denkansatz mit hoher Detailgenauigkeit - Fließende Englischkenntnisse (erforderlich) Bevorzugte Qualifikationen - Erfahrung mit 3D‑Modellierungs‑ oder 3D‑Animationssoftware - Vorherige Erfahrung in einem Unternehmens‑ oder B2B‑Marketing‑Umfeld Unser Engagement für Vielfalt und Inklusion Treten Sie einem Unternehmen bei, das den Mehrwert von Vielfalt, Inklusion und Zugehörigkeit erkennt. Wir fördern ein Arbeitsumfeld, in dem alle Menschen respektiert und geschätzt werden für all die Aspekte, die sie einzigartig machen. Wir stellen Sie ein, weil Sie sind, wer Sie sind, und wir möchten, dass Sie Ihr wahres Selbst jeden Tag zur Arbeit bringen! Board International ist ein Arbeitgeber, der Chancengleichheit bietet und sich zu einer vielfältigen und inklusiven Belegschaft verpflichtet. Ihre personenbezogenen Daten werden so lange gespeichert, wie es zur Bearbeitung Ihrer Bewerbung und zur Erbringung der von Ihnen angeforderten Dienstleistung erforderlich ist. Ihre Daten können auch zur Erfüllung gesetzlicher Verpflichtungen verarbeitet werden. In jedem Fall werden Ihre Daten ohne unangemessene Verzögerung gelöscht, sobald die genannten gesetzlichen Pflichten erfüllt sind. Ihre Daten werden von Board International SA und/oder deren Tochtergesellschaften, die in der EU oder außerhalb ansässig sind, auf Grundlage der geeigneten Schutzmaßnahmen gemäß der europäischen Verordnung 2016/679 erhoben und verwendet. Sie können jederzeit den Zugriff, die Berichtigung und/oder die Löschung Ihrer personenbezogenen Daten, die von Board International SA oder deren Tochtergesellschaften für Rekrutierungszwecke verwendet werden, verlangen. Für weitere Fragen lesen Sie bitte unsere Datenschutzerklärung unter https://www.board.com/en/privacy-policy
descriptionByLocale.fr: Chez Board, nous fournissons des solutions de planification financière et opérationnelle pour les meilleures marques du monde. Des milliers d'entreprises utilisent notre technologie pour optimiser les ressources, stimuler la croissance et garantir la rentabilité. Grâce à l'analytique avancée et aux prévisions, ainsi qu'aux insights alimentés par l'IA, les clients transforment des données complexes et en temps réel en informations exploitables. Qu'est-ce qui a été la clé de notre succès ? Nos personnes – nous valorisons la perspective unique et l'énergie que chacun apporte à l'organisation. Nous collaborons ouvertement entre équipes et frontières. Nous adoptons un état d'esprit de croissance pour obtenir des résultats. Et nous célébrons le succès partagé à mesure que les objectifs et les jalons sont atteints. Prêt à rejoindre une équipe où l'innovation rencontre la collaboration ? Si vous êtes animé par des idées audacieuses et une mentalité centrée sur le client, votre prochaine aventure commence ici ! Nous recherchons actuellement un Videomaker & Motion Designer pour rejoindre notre équipe Global Marketing à notre siège de Chiasso, dans le cadre d'un contrat temporaire de remplacement maternité. Relevant du Communication Manager et travaillant en étroite collaboration avec le Graphic & Creative Leader, vous jouerez un rôle clé dans la production de contenus vidéo et visuels engageants qui soutiennent la stratégie de communication globale de Board. Ce poste offre une opportunité unique de mettre votre créativité et vos compétences en storytelling au service d'une entreprise logicielle internationale en forte croissance, dont le produit est à la pointe technologique de son marché. Responsabilités clés - Soutenir la production de vidéos institutionnelles et marketing en utilisant Adobe After Effects et Adobe Premiere - Gérer les flux de travail d'édition vidéo et de post‑production - Enregistrer du contenu photo et vidéo pour les initiatives de communication internes et externes - Produire des motion graphics et des actifs visuels animés pour soutenir les campagnes marketing et le storytelling d'entreprise - Collaborer avec les équipes Marketing et Creative afin d'assurer la cohérence visuelle avec l'identité de marque de Board - Assister à l'installation et à la gestion de l'éclairage et du matériel d'enregistrement lors d'interviews, d'événements et de tournages en direct Compétences et qualifications requises - Expérience avérée en production vidéo, motion design et design graphique - Expertise solide en montage vidéo avec Adobe Premiere - Compétences en motion graphics et animation avec Adobe After Effects - Expérience avec des caméras vidéo professionnelles (ex. Sony Alpha 7, FX3) - Capacité à installer et gérer du matériel d'éclairage professionnel pour les interviews, les tournages vidéo et les événements - Maîtrise de la suite Adobe Creative, incluant : Photoshop, Lightroom, Illustrator - Bonne connaissance des outils Microsoft Office - Solides compétences organisationnelles et de gestion du temps - Capacité à travailler en collaboration au sein d'une équipe - Esprit créatif avec une grande attention aux détails - Maîtrise de l'anglais (obligatoire) Qualifications préférées - Expérience avec des logiciels de modélisation 3D ou d'animation 3D - Expérience antérieure dans un environnement marketing corporate ou B2B Notre engagement en faveur de la diversité et de l'inclusion Rejoignez une entreprise qui croit à la valeur ajoutée de la diversité, de l'inclusion et du sentiment d'appartenance. Nous favorisons un environnement de travail où chaque personne est respectée et valorisée pour tous les aspects qui la rendent unique. Nous vous recrutons pour ce que vous êtes, et nous souhaitons que vous apportiez votre vrai moi au travail chaque jour ! Board International est un employeur garantissant l'égalité des chances et s'engage à une main‑d'œuvre diversifiée et inclusive. Vos données personnelles seront conservées aussi longtemps que nécessaire pour traiter les candidatures que vous avez soumises et pour la prestation du service que vous avez demandé. Vos données peuvent également être traitées pour le respect des obligations prévues par la loi. Dans tous les cas, vos données seront supprimées sans délai injustifié une fois les obligations légales sus‑mentionnées remplies. Vos données sont collectées et utilisées par Board International SA et/ou ses filiales situées dans l'UE ou à l'extérieur, sur la base des garanties appropriées prévues par le Règlement européen 2016/679. Vous pouvez à tout moment demander l'accès, la correction et/ou la suppression de vos données personnelles utilisées par Board International SA ou ses filiales à des fins de recrutement. Pour toute question supplémentaire, veuillez consulter notre Politique de confidentialité à l'adresse https://www.board.com/en/privacy-policy
